concerns.text: Task T014 implements exclusion logic for `synthesis_condition` (FR-002) which the plan explicitly removed. The task attempts to enforce a spec requirement that the plan has invalidated without a spec amendment, creating a logical contradiction where the task enforces a constraint on data that no longer exists in the pipeline.

Task T017 implements KNN imputation using 'Morgan fingerprints' (structure-based), whereas FR-003 explicitly mandates 'stoichiometry similarity (normalized element counts)'. This is a semantic weakening of the functional requirement; the task delivers a different algorithm than specified without a documented justification or spec update.

Task T026 is marked as failed/missing the required `code/models/best_xgboost.json` artifact. FR-004 mandates saving the best model. A task that fails to produce the required deliverable violates the constraint preservation principle as the FR is not satisfied.

Task T028a is marked as failed/missing `outputs/normality_check.json`. FR-005 requires the system to perform a Shapiro-Wilk test and log the decision logic. The missing artifact means the acceptance criterion for the statistical decision flow is not met.

Task T029 is marked as failed/missing `outputs/metrics.json`. FR-005 and SC-001/SC-005 require the generation of performance metrics (R², MAE, p-value). The missing artifact prevents verification of the core statistical claims.

Task T035 is marked as failed/missing `outputs/feature_importance.png`. FR-006 mandates generating a bar plot of the top 5 descriptors. The missing artifact means the requirement for visualization is not satisfied.

Task T010 is marked as failed/truncated and missing `data/raw/oc20_sample.h5`. FR-001 mandates downloading the dataset. Without this artifact, the entire pipeline foundation is unverified, and downstream tasks (T014-T020) are operating on non-existent data, violating the data hygiene and reproducibility constraints.
